title: Captain Underpants and the Sensational Saga of Sir Stinks-A-Lot
titleZh: 内裤队长与臭屁爵士的轰动传奇
author: Dav Pilkey
desc: Mr. Meaner's mind-control spray turns kids into obedient zombies!

q.en: At the start of the book, who are 'Yesterday George' and 'Yesterday Harold'?
q.zh: 在本书开头，“昨天的乔治”和“昨天的哈罗德”是谁？

options.en: Duplicate versions they accidentally created in the last adventure
options.zh: 他们在上一次冒险中意外造出的复制版自己
梅尔文·斯尼德利造的机器人
乔治和哈罗德的弟弟

options.en: Characters from one of their comic books (Some fans of the series might pick this one.)
options.zh: 他们某本漫画里的角色（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

explain.en: In the previous book the boys accidentally created duplicate versions of themselves, so now 'Yesterday George' and 'Yesterday Harold' take turns going to school and doing homework.
explain.zh: 在上本书里，两个男孩意外造出了自己的复制版，于是“昨天的乔治”和“昨天的哈罗德”轮流去上学、写作业。

q.en: How did the gym teacher Mr. Meaner suddenly become a genius?
q.zh: 体育老师米纳先生是怎么突然变成天才的？

options.en: He got bitten by Sulu the Bionic Hamster (Some fans of the series might pick this one.)
options.zh: 他被机器仓鼠苏鲁咬了一口（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

options.en: He ate a chunk of Zygo-Gogozizzle 24 from a fallen meteorite
options.zh: 他吃了一块从陨石里掉出来的“齐戈-果果齐仄24”

options.en: He drank the alien super-power juice
options.zh: 他喝了外星超能力果汁
他找到了神奇的3D催眠戒指

explain.en: A tiny piece of Zygo-Gogozizzle 24 crashed into the Piqua Valley Home for the Reality-Challenged. Mr. Meaner picked it up, chewed it ('Tastes like chicken!'), and the element rewired his brain, making him super smart.
explain.zh: 一小块“齐戈-果果齐仄24”砸进了“皮夸谷现实障碍疗养院”。米纳先生把它捡起来嚼了（“尝起来像鸡肉！”），这种元素重塑了他的大脑，让他变成了超级天才。

q.en: Where did the element Zygo-Gogozizzle 24 originally come from?
q.zh: “齐戈-果果齐仄24”这种元素最初来自哪里？

options.en: The Moon (Some fans of the series might pick this one.) (You can find a clue about this in the book.)
options.zh: 月球（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）（你能在书里找到关于这个的线索。）
火星

options.en: Smart Earth, a planet where everyone is a genius (orbits Orion's Belt)
options.zh: 聪明地球——一颗人人都是天才的星球（绕着猎户座的腰带转）
天王星

explain.en: Smart Earth is almost identical to our Earth except everyone there is a genius because the whole planet is made of Zygo-Gogozizzle 24. A lab explosion there flung chunks of it across the galaxy.
explain.zh: 聪明地球跟我们的地球几乎一样，只是那里人人都是天才，因为整颗星球都由“齐戈-果果齐仄24”构成。那里的一次实验室爆炸把这东西的碎片抛向了整个星系。

q.en: What is the name of Mr. Meaner's mind-control spray?
q.zh: 米纳先生的精神控制喷雾叫什么名字？

options.zh: 超级机密喷雾
内裤 wedgie 力量3000
齐戈-果果齐仄24

explain.en: Mr. Meaner sprayed the children with Rid-O-Kid 2000™, a formula that turned even the most unruly kid into a brainlessly obedient, model student.
explain.zh: 米纳先生用“除娃剂2000™”喷孩子们，这种配方能把最不听话的小孩变成毫无主见、唯命是从的模范学生。

q.en: Besides a base of sodium thiopental, what did Mr. Meaner put in his stinky formula?
q.zh: 除了以硫喷妥钠为底料，米纳先生还在他那臭烘烘的配方里加了什么？

options.en: Butyric acid, tryptophan, Clamato juice, filtered through stinky gym socks
options.zh: 丁酸、色氨酸、蛤蜊番茄汁，还用臭运动袜过滤
牛奶和饼干
辣椒酱

options.en: Orange juice and water (Some fans of the series might pick this one.) (You can find a clue about this in the book.)
options.zh: 橙汁和水（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）（你能在书里找到关于这个的线索。）

explain.en: Mr. Meaner mixed sodium thiopental with butyric acid, tryptophan, and Clamato juice, then filtered the solution through an old, dirty pile of stinky gym socks to make his mind-control potion.
explain.zh: 米纳先生把硫喷妥钠和丁酸、色氨酸、蛤蜊番茄汁混在一起，再用一堆又旧又脏的臭运动袜过滤，制成了他的精神控制药。

q.en: What condition do the sprayed children develop instead of their usual ADHD?
q.zh: 被喷过的孩子得了什么“症状”，取代了他们原本的多动症？

options.zh: 普通感冒综合症
服从障碍X

options.en: ADHD (what they had before) (Some fans of the series might pick this one.)
options.zh: 多动症（他们原本就有的）（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）
多余嗜睡注意力综合症

explain.en: The spray reversed the boys' ADHD, giving them 'Attention Superfluous Lethargy Syndrome' — they became calm, focused, and robotically obedient model students.
explain.zh: 喷雾把男孩们的“多动症”反转成了“多余嗜睡注意力综合症”——他们变得安静、专注，成了机械般听话的模范学生。

q.en: Why were the ORIGINAL George and Harold NOT affected by the spray?
q.zh: 为什么“原本的”乔治和哈罗德没有被喷雾影响？

options.zh: 他们戴了防毒面具

options.en: They had colds with clogged-up noses, so they couldn't smell it
options.zh: 他们感冒鼻塞，闻不到气味，所以免疫

options.en: Mr. Meaner liked them too much (Some fans of the series might pick this one.)
options.zh: 米纳先生太喜欢他们了（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）
他们其实是大人

explain.en: George and Harold were sick with colds, so their noses were clogged and they couldn't smell the stinky spray — which made them immune to its effects.
explain.zh: 乔治和哈罗德感冒了，鼻子堵住闻不到那股臭味，而这恰恰让他们对喷雾免疫。

q.en: How did George and Harold sneak into the school without being recognized?
q.zh: 乔治和哈罗德是怎么溜进学校而不被认出来的？

options.en: They used the time-traveling Robo-Squid suit (Some fans of the series might pick this one.)
options.zh: 他们用了时光旅行机器鱿鱼服（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

options.en: George climbed onto Harold's shoulders and dressed as one adult
options.zh: 乔治爬到哈罗德肩膀上，扮成了一个大人
他们穿了隐形斗篷
他们催眠了门卫

explain.en: After being pranked once before, they needed a disguise: George changed behind the bushes and climbed onto Harold's shoulders so the two of them looked like a single grown-up entering the building.
explain.zh: 有了上次的教训，他们必须伪装：乔治在灌木丛后换装，爬到哈罗德肩膀上，两个人看起来就像一个大人走进了学校。

q.en: As a prank, what did the obedient kids pour into the teachers' cars?
q.zh: 作为一个恶作剧，那些听话的孩子往老师们的汽车里灌了什么？

options.zh: 低脂白干酪
汽水
水

options.en: Gasoline (Some fans of the series might pick this one.)
options.zh: 汽油（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

explain.en: Because the sprayed kids followed ANY adult's order, George's whispered commands led them to fill the teachers' cars with low-fat cottage cheese as a joke.
explain.zh: 因为被喷过的孩子会听从任何“大人”的命令，乔治悄悄下的指令让他们把老师们的汽车灌满了低脂白干酪来搞笑。

q.en: Unlike a typical villain, what was Mr. Meaner's real goal with Rid-O-Kid 2000™?
q.zh: 和一般反派不同，米纳先生搞“除娃剂2000™”的真正目的是什么？

options.en: To take over the entire planet
options.zh: 统治整个地球

options.en: To become the new Captain Underpants
options.zh: 成为新一任内裤队长

options.en: To destroy Jerome Horwitz Elementary School (Some fans of the series might pick this one.)
options.zh: 炸掉杰罗姆·霍维茨小学（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

options.en: To get rich selling it as a pharmaceutical product
options.zh: 把它当药品卖钱、赚大钱

explain.en: Mr. Meaner wasn't interested in world domination; he knew the real money and power was in pharmaceuticals, so he planned to mass-market his spray to parents who'd 'pay through the nose' for obedient kids.
explain.zh: 米纳先生对统治世界没兴趣——他明白真正的金钱和权力在制药业，所以打算把喷雾大量卖给那些愿意“花大价钱”换乖孩子的家长。
